introSection:
Tempesto is a steel launched roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA. It was built by Premier Rides and opened on April 25, 2015.

The support structure was fabricated by Valley Iron.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Construction on Tempesto started in August 2014, in a small patch of land next to Apollo's Chariot.

Tempesto opened on April 25, 2015. During the opening ceremony, there was a strip of flags instead of a ribbon.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Tempesto is a Sky Rocket II installation from Premier Rides.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Unlike the other roller coasters which share this layout, Tempesto's train has an extra car.

fullText:
Tempesto is a steel launched roller coaster located at Busch Gardens Williamsburg in Williamsburg, Virginia, USA. It was built by Premier Rides and opened on April 25, 2015.

The support structure was fabricated by Valley Iron.

Construction on Tempesto started in August 2014, in a small patch of land next to Apollo's Chariot.

Tempesto opened on April 25, 2015. During the opening ceremony, there was a strip of flags instead of a ribbon.

Tempesto is a Sky Rocket II installation from Premier Rides.



Unlike the other roller coasters which share this layout, Tempesto's train has an extra car.
